title: 礼儀は大事なんだよっ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I meet up with Vodka, she lets out a
big sigh.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I just ran into Opera O. She said hi to me, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: She was so cool, I couldn't help but stare...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, she was already gone. She
probably thinks I totally ignored her!
choice_data_list:
There's no need to worry about it that much, is
there?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know we all leave ranks to the races. It's not like
I have to be super polite to upperclassman, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But if she starts thinkin' I'm some brat who won't
even say hi back to her—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't be able to take it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What am I even doing? I'm being so lame...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to forgive herself, Vodka's mood remains
in the dumps for quite a while after.
